name: KleinClaw
description: Kleinanzeigen tools that can change live listings, edit local browser settings, and run the embedded miniclaw browser runtime with redacted output.

workingDirectory.description: Directory where miniclaw should find config.yaml when no config path is set.

configPath.description: Optional path to the miniclaw config. Tool output redacts this path.

adRoots.description: Trusted roots for adConfigPaths and adDirectories scoped operations.

workspaceMode.description: miniclaw workspace mode. Defaults to portable.

timeoutMs.description: Maximum runtime for one miniclaw command.

maxOutputChars.description: Maximum sanitized stdout or stderr characters returned by the tool.

approvalMode.description: Approval mode for tool runs. Use all unless local checks should run without an approval route.
